CREATE TABLE geospatial_data (id Int32, location_point POINT);
INSERT INTO geospatial_data VALUES (1, toPoint(37.7749, -122.4194)), (2, toPoint(34.0522, -118.2437)), (3, toPoint(40.7128, -74.0060));
SELECT id, geohash(location_point) AS geohash FROM geospatial_data;
SELECT id, geohash(location_point) AS geohash, length(geohash(location_point)) AS geohash_length FROM geospatial_data WHERE geohash_length >= 5;
CREATE TABLE location_data (user_id Int32, geo_point POINT);
INSERT INTO location_data VALUES (1, toPoint(37.7749, -122.4194)), (2, toPoint(34.0522, -118.2437)), (3, toPoint(40.7128, -74.0060));
SELECT g.id, g.geohash FROM (SELECT id, geohash(location_point) AS geohash FROM geospatial_data) AS g JOIN location_data l ON g.geohash = geohash(l.geo_point);
SELECT g.id, count(*) as frequency FROM (SELECT id, geohash(location_point) AS geohash FROM geospatial_data) AS g GROUP BY g.geohash;

SELECT g1.id, g2.id FROM (SELECT id, geohash(location_point) AS geohash FROM geospatial_data) AS g1 JOIN (SELECT id, geohash(geo_point) AS geohash FROM location_data) AS g2 ON g1.geohash = g2.geohash WHERE length(g1.geohash) = 7;
SELECT id, geohash(toPoint(40.7128, -74.0060)) AS target_geohash FROM geospatial_data ORDER BY abs(length(geohash(location_point)) - length(target_geohash)) ASC;
SELECT id, geohash(toPoint(48.8566, 2.3522)) AS geohash FROM geospatial_data WHERE geohash(location_point) LIKE 'u4prv%';
